priority_1_meta_description.detail: Added YAML front-matter description field: 157 chars, includes primary keyword 'AI agent orchestration' and CTA. Also added HTML comment with audit tracking.

priority_2_readability.detail: Shortened longest sentences, added 3 plain-language paragraph interludes (Executive Summary: 'In plain terms…', Single-Agent: 'Put simply…', Conclusion: 'The bottom line…'). Replaced jargon: eliminated 'categorical', 'structural limits' → 'structural limits' kept acceptable, 'augmented' → removed, 'mitigation' kept but balanced with simpler constructions. Replaced 'fabricated information' → 'fabricated information' kept (clear enough). Simplified: 'perpetual pilots' → kept (good phrase), 'attention dilution' → kept but surrounded with simpler explanation. Overall syllable-reducing edits throughout.

priority_3_title_truncation.detail: Shortened title from 94 chars ('AI Agent Orchestration in 2026: The Enterprise Guide to Multi-Agent Systems That Actually Work') to 55 chars ('AI Agent Orchestration in 2026: The Enterprise Guide'). Well under 60-char SERP limit.
